description: Domain registration, availability, DNS records, and IP/ASN resolution via RDAP and DNS-over-HTTPS.
name: io.github.cyanheads/whois-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Public origin override for deployments behind a TLS-terminating reverse proxy (e.g. https://mcp.example.com).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_PUBLIC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout for RDAP requests in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: RDAP_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: HTTP timeout for DNS-over-HTTPS requests in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: DOH_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts on transient RDAP failures.
environmentVariables.name: RDAP_MAX_RETRIES

environmentVariables.description: Max retry attempts on transient DNS-over-HTTPS failures.
environmentVariables.name: DOH_MAX_RETRIES
